sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8810" key="a)nqoplo/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθο-πλόκος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n8810.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who plaits flowers,</tr_> Rhetor.ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).209</biblScope></bibl>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
